Description: Unique road segment identifier.
Approx. edge betweenness centrality (normalized); proxy for through-traffic potential (from node estimates averaged over endpoints).
Approx. closeness centrality (normalized) at segment endpoints (average); higher = more central/accessible in the network.
Straightness = Euclidean distance / network (segment) length; 1 = perfectly straight, <1 = detour/curvy.
Average node degree of the two endpoints; higher = more connected intersections.
Segment physical length (meters).
Binary indicator: OSM 'highway' type == 'motorway'.
Binary indicator: OSM 'highway' type == 'trunk'.
Binary indicator: OSM 'highway' type == 'primary'.
Binary indicator: OSM 'highway' type == 'secondary'.
Binary indicator: OSM 'highway' type == 'tertiary'.
Binary indicator: OSM 'highway' type == 'residential'.
Binary indicator: OSM 'highway' type == 'living_street'.
Binary indicator: OSM 'highway' type == 'pedestrian'.
Binary indicator: OSM 'highway' type == 'cycleway'.
Binary indicator: OSM 'highway' type == 'footway'.
Binary indicator: OSM 'highway' type == 'path'.
Binary indicator: OSM 'highway' type == 'service'.
Binary indicator: OSM 'highway' type == 'other'.
Intersection density within 50m buffer: count of nodes with degree≥3 per hectare.
Dead-end ratio within 50m buffer: proportion of degree-1 nodes among all nodes in buffer.
Road density within 50m buffer: total road length (km) per km2.
Intersection density within 200m buffer: count of nodes with degree≥3 per hectare.
Dead-end ratio within 200m buffer: proportion of degree-1 nodes among all nodes in buffer.
Road density within 200m buffer: total road length (km) per km2.
Intersection density within 500m buffer: count of nodes with degree≥3 per hectare.
Dead-end ratio within 500m buffer: proportion of degree-1 nodes among all nodes in buffer.
Road density within 500m buffer: total road length (km) per km2.
Mean circuity within 500m: average network distance / Euclidean distance for local connections; higher = more circuitous street pattern.
Orientation entropy within 500m: Shannon entropy of edge bearings; higher = more grid-like/diverse directions.
Segment slope (%): |elev_end - elev_start| / segment_length × 100.
Elevation at segment midpoint (meters).
Relative elevation (meters): segment midpoint elevation minus mean elevation within 500m.
Mean terrain slope (%) within 200m buffer.
Std. dev. of terrain slope (%) within 200m buffer (ruggedness proxy).
Mean terrain slope (%) within 500m buffer.
Std. dev. of terrain slope (%) within 500m buffer (ruggedness proxy).
Distance to population-weighted center (km) from segment midpoint.
Distance to urban boundary / city edge (km) from segment midpoint.
Binary indicator: segment is inside the defined urban core (e.g., central area threshold).
Distance to primary urban subcenter (km) from segment midpoint.
Distance to secondary urban subcenter (km) from segment midpoint.
Assigned subcenter rank (e.g., 1=primary, 2=secondary, ...), based on nearest/strongest subcenter.
Building density within 50m buffer: buildings per hectare.
Building coverage within 50m buffer: total footprint area / buffer area (ratio).
Building perimeter density within 50m buffer: total building perimeter length per hectare.
Mean building height (m) within 50m buffer.
Std. dev. of building height (m) within 50m buffer (heterogeneity).
90th percentile building height (m) within 50m buffer.
Median individual building footprint area (m2) within 50m buffer.
Floor area ratio (FAR) within 50m buffer: sum(footprint × height/3) / buffer area.
Mean building compactness within 50m buffer (e.g., 4πA/P2; higher = more compact).
Gini coefficient of building footprint areas within 50m buffer (inequality of sizes).
Building density within 200m buffer: buildings per hectare.
Building coverage within 200m buffer: total footprint area / buffer area (ratio).
Building perimeter density within 200m buffer: total building perimeter length per hectare.
Mean building height (m) within 200m buffer.
Std. dev. of building height (m) within 200m buffer (heterogeneity).
90th percentile building height (m) within 200m buffer.
Median individual building footprint area (m2) within 200m buffer.
Floor area ratio (FAR) within 200m buffer: sum(footprint × height/3) / buffer area.
Mean building compactness within 200m buffer (e.g., 4πA/P2; higher = more compact).
Gini coefficient of building footprint areas within 200m buffer (inequality of sizes).
Building density within 500m buffer: buildings per hectare.
Building coverage within 500m buffer: total footprint area / buffer area (ratio).
Building perimeter density within 500m buffer: total building perimeter length per hectare.
Mean building height (m) within 500m buffer.
Std. dev. of building height (m) within 500m buffer (heterogeneity).
90th percentile building height (m) within 500m buffer.
Median individual building footprint area (m2) within 500m buffer.
Floor area ratio (FAR) within 500m buffer: sum(footprint × height/3) / buffer area.
Mean building compactness within 500m buffer (e.g., 4πA/P2; higher = more compact).
Gini coefficient of building footprint areas within 500m buffer (inequality of sizes).
Street wall ratio: proportion of three sampled points along the segment with a building facade within ~15m (enclosure/continuity proxy).
Mean building setback (m): average distance from three sampled points along the segment (start, midpoint, end) to the nearest building facade.
